llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.5 (Approval of Board Policy 6157 - Distance Teaching and Learning) was moved from its posted position (item 40) to immediately after item 8.1 (Discussion on COVID-19). Items 10.3 and 10.4 were moved to consent agenda. These changes were announced and approved at the start of the meeting during the 'Changes to the Agenda' section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So we're moving on to consent items. We need a motion to approve. Domo, Cecilia. Second, Elisa, thank you. A roll call vote.
